text.value:
-- Reload all 5 gold dims. Truncate first so re-runs stay idempotent.

TRUNCATE TABLE dim.date;
WITH 
digits AS (
    SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 
    UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 
    UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9
),
numbers AS (
    SELECT (d1.n + d2.n * 10 + d3.n * 100 + d4.n * 1000) AS n
    FROM digits d1 CROSS JOIN digits d2 CROSS JOIN digits d3 CROSS JOIN digits d4
),
date_spine AS (
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, n, CAST('2020-01-01' AS DATE)) AS d
    FROM numbers
    WHERE n <= DATEDIFF(DAY, '2020-01-01', '2030-12-31')
)
INSERT INTO dim.date (
    date_key, full_date, day_of_month, day_name, day_of_week,
    week_of_year, month_number, month_name, quarter_number,
    quarter_name, year_number, year_month, is_weekend, is_month_end
)
SELECT
    YEAR(d) * 10000 + MONTH(d) * 100 + DAY(d), d,
    DAY(d), DATENAME(WEEKDAY, d), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, d),
    DATEPART(WEEK, d), MONTH(d), DATENAME(MONTH, d),
    DATEPART(QUARTER, d), CONCAT('Q', DATEPART(QUARTER, d)),
    YEAR(d), CONCAT(YEAR(d), '-', RIGHT(CONCAT('0', MONTH(d)), 2)),
    CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, d) IN (1, 7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN d = EOMONTH(d) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FROM date_spine;

TRUNCATE TABLE dim.carrier;
INSERT INTO dim.carrier (
    carrier_key, carrier_natural_key, carrier_name,
    am_best_rating, is_admitted, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY carrier_id),
    carrier_id, carrier_name, am_best_rating, admitted,
    SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_carriers
WHERE carrier_id IS NOT NULL AND carrier_name IS NOT NULL AND admitted IS NOT NULL;

TRUNCATE TABLE dim.program;
INSERT INTO dim.program (
    program_key, program_natural_key, program_name,
    base_premium_min, base_premium_max, loss_ratio_target,
    commission_modifier, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY program_code),
    program_code, program_name, base_premium_min, base_premium_max,
    loss_ratio_target, commission_modifier, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_programs
WHERE program_code IS NOT NULL AND program_name IS NOT NULL
  AND base_premium_min IS NOT NULL AND base_premium_max IS NOT NULL
  AND loss_ratio_target IS NOT NULL AND commission_modifier IS NOT NULL;

TRUNCATE TABLE dim.agent;
INSERT INTO dim.agent (
    agent_key, agent_natural_key, first_name, last_name,
    agency_name, state_code, agent_tier, commission_rate,
    hire_date, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY agent_id),
    agent_id, first_name, last_name, agency_name,
    state, tier, commission_rate, CAST(hire_date AS DATE),
    SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_agents
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND first_name IS NOT NULL AND last_name IS NOT NULL
  AND agency_name IS NOT NULL AND state IS NOT NULL AND tier IS NOT NULL
  AND commission_rate IS NOT NULL AND hire_date IS NOT NULL;

TRUNCATE TABLE dim.policy;
INSERT INTO dim.policy (
    policy_key, policy_natural_key, program_code, carrier_id,
    agent_id, effective_date, expiration_date, premium,
    policy_status, insured_name, insured_state, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY policy_id),
    policy_id, program_code, carrier_id, agent_id,
    CAST(effective_date AS DATE), CAST(expiration_date AS DATE),
    premium, status, insured_name, insured_state,
    SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_policies
WHERE policy_id IS NOT NULL AND program_code IS NOT NULL
  AND carrier_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND effective_date IS NOT NULL AND expiration_date IS NOT NULL
  AND premium IS NOT NULL AND status IS NOT NULL
  AND insured_name IS NOT NULL AND insured_state IS NOT NULL;

-- Reload all 4 gold fact tables. Dims must be fully loaded first.

TRUNCATE TABLE fact.premium;
INSERT INTO fact.premium (
    premium_key, date_key, policy_key, agent_key,
    program_key, carrier_key, policy_natural_key,
    premium, created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.policy_id),
    YEAR(CAST(s.effective_date AS DATE)) * 10000
        + MONTH(CAST(s.effective_date AS DATE)) * 100
        + DAY(CAST(s.effective_date AS DATE)),
    pol.policy_key, a.agent_key, prog.program_key, c.carrier_key,
    s.policy_id, s.premium, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_policies s
JOIN dim.policy   pol  ON s.policy_id    = pol.policy_natural_key
JOIN dim.agent    a    ON s.agent_id     = a.agent_natural_key
JOIN dim.program  prog ON s.program_code = prog.program_natural_key
JOIN dim.carrier  c    ON s.carrier_id   = c.carrier_natural_key
WHERE s.policy_id IS NOT NULL AND s.effective_date IS NOT NULL
  AND s.premium IS NOT NULL AND s.agent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND s.program_code IS NOT NULL AND s.carrier_id IS NOT NULL;

TRUNCATE TABLE fact.claims;
INSERT INTO fact.claims (
    claim_key, loss_date_key, report_date_key,
    policy_key, agent_key, program_key, carrier_key,
    claim_natural_key, policy_natural_key,
    claim_amount, claim_status, cause_of_loss,
    created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.claim_id),
    YEAR(CAST(s.loss_date AS DATE)) * 10000
        + MONTH(CAST(s.loss_date AS DATE)) * 100
        + DAY(CAST(s.loss_date AS DATE)),
    YEAR(CAST(s.report_date AS DATE)) * 10000
        + MONTH(CAST(s.report_date AS DATE)) * 100
        + DAY(CAST(s.report_date AS DATE)),
    pol.policy_key, a.agent_key, prog.program_key, c.carrier_key,
    s.claim_id, s.policy_id,
    s.claim_amount, s.claim_status, s.cause_of_loss,
    SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_claims s
JOIN dim.policy   pol  ON s.policy_id      = pol.policy_natural_key
JOIN dim.agent    a    ON pol.agent_id     = a.agent_natural_key
JOIN dim.program  prog ON pol.program_code = prog.program_natural_key
JOIN dim.carrier  c    ON pol.carrier_id   = c.carrier_natural_key
WHERE s.claim_id IS NOT NULL AND s.policy_id IS NOT NULL
  AND s.loss_date IS NOT NULL AND s.report_date IS NOT NULL
  AND s.claim_amount IS NOT NULL AND s.claim_status IS NOT NULL
  AND s.cause_of_loss IS NOT NULL;

TRUNCATE TABLE fact.commission;
INSERT INTO fact.commission (
    commission_key, date_key, policy_key, agent_key,
    program_key, carrier_key, payout_natural_key, policy_natural_key,
    premium_amount, commission_rate, program_modifier,
    volume_bonus, status_multiplier, commission_amount,
    true_tier_rate, true_program_modifier, true_volume_bonus,
    true_status_multiplier, true_effective_rate, true_commission_amount,
    adjustments, policy_status, payout_status, calc_method,
    created_at, updated_at
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.payout_id),
    YEAR(s.payout_date) * 10000 + MONTH(s.payout_date) * 100 + DAY(s.payout_date),
    pol.policy_key, a.agent_key, prog.program_key, c.carrier_key,
    s.payout_id, s.policy_id,
    s.premium, s.commission_rate, s.program_modifier,
    s.volume_bonus, s.status_multiplier, s.commission_amount,
    s.true_tier_rate, s.true_program_modifier, s.true_volume_bonus,
    s.true_status_multiplier, s.silver_effective_rate, s.silver_commission_amount,
    s.adjustments, s.policy_status, s.payout_status, s.calc_method,
    SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_commission_payouts s
JOIN dim.policy   pol  ON s.policy_id      = pol.policy_natural_key
JOIN dim.agent    a    ON pol.agent_id     = a.agent_natural_key
JOIN dim.program  prog ON pol.program_code = prog.program_natural_key
JOIN dim.carrier  c    ON pol.carrier_id   = c.carrier_natural_key
WHERE s.payout_id IS NOT NULL AND s.policy_id IS NOT NULL
  AND s.payout_date IS NOT NULL AND s.premium IS NOT NULL
  AND s.commission_rate IS NOT NULL AND s.program_modifier IS NOT NULL
  AND s.volume_bonus IS NOT NULL AND s.status_multiplier IS NOT NULL
  AND s.commission_amount IS NOT NULL AND s.true_tier_rate IS NOT NULL
  AND s.true_program_modifier IS NOT NULL AND s.true_volume_bonus IS NOT NULL
  AND s.true_status_multiplier IS NOT NULL AND s.silver_effective_rate IS NOT NULL
  AND s.silver_commission_amount IS NOT NULL AND s.adjustments IS NOT NULL
  AND s.policy_status IS NOT NULL AND s.payout_status IS NOT NULL
  AND s.calc_method IS NOT NULL;

TRUNCATE TABLE fact.commission_reconciliation;
INSERT INTO fact.commission_reconciliation
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY scr.payout_id),
    dp.policy_key, da.agent_key, dpr.program_key, dc.carrier_key,
    YEAR(scr.payout_date) * 10000 + MONTH(scr.payout_date) * 100 + DAY(scr.payout_date),
    scr.payout_id, scr.policy_id,
    scr.premium, scr.commission_amount, scr.silver_commission_amount,
    scr.variance, scr.commission_rate, scr.true_tier_rate,
    scr.program_modifier, scr.true_program_modifier,
    scr.volume_bonus, scr.true_volume_bonus,
    scr.drift_direction, scr.drift_pattern, scr.payout_status,
    SYSDATETIME()
FROM silver_citadel_mga.dbo.silver_commission_reconciliation scr
INNER JOIN dim.policy   dp  ON scr.policy_id    = dp.policy_natural_key
INNER JOIN dim.agent    da  ON scr.agent_id     = da.agent_natural_key
INNER JOIN dim.program  dpr ON scr.program_code = dpr.program_natural_key
INNER JOIN dim.carrier  dc  ON dp.carrier_id    = dc.carrier_natural_key
INNER JOIN dim.date     dd  ON (YEAR(scr.payout_date) * 10000
                              + MONTH(scr.payout_date) * 100
                              + DAY(scr.payout_date)) = dd.date_key;
